proposed_relations.description: Transit Signal Priority considered as a tool for the 116th Street Bus Priority Review corridor

evidence_refs.source_quote: • Traffic signal timing • Transit Signal Priority (TSP) • Bus lane camera enforcement – DOT stationary cameras – MTA on-bus cameras (ACE) • Tree pits & streetscape improvements • Automated Pedestrian Signals (APS) • DOT Art

decisions.rationale: Source page 23 'Other Tools' lists Transit Signal Priority as a tool in the toolkit being presented for the 116th Street corridor Bus Priority Review project. The source directly supports this treatment being considered as part of the corridor study.
